messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-614 — mono-router rotate-home? fires for the coordinator, respawn-killing the live coder pane
What it solves: e2e QA procedure: on the live mono-router swarm, with the coordinator's
inbox empty (new/ and in_process/ hold no .handoff), run
swarmforge/scripts/ready_for_next.sh with SWARMFORGE_ROLE=coordinator from
the master checkout. Verify: output is NO_TASK with no ROTATE_HOME /
HOME_ROLE lines; the swarm…
Approval context: Two things to sign off. (1) This is the first ticket specced with required_stages under the now-ON routing flag: it declares [coder, qa] and skips cleaner/architect/hardender/documenter with reasons in the YAML — reject the skip if you want the full chain on a liveness-critical guard. (2) Fix shape…
BL-614 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-614" (or "reject BL-614 <reason>") to act.
